extortion.description: Alereon is a global leader in ultrawideband (UWB) wireless solutions, providing high-speed, short-range wireless technology for various industries. They design and fabricate UWB chipsets and offer a range of products and services, including wireless modules, reference designs, and custom hardware and software development. Their solutions cater to a diverse clientele, including consumer electronics, medical devices, and military applications that require reliable, high-speed wireless communication. Established in 2004, Alereon has built a strong reputation for meeting customers' high-speed wireless needs through innovative and customized solutions===> Revenue: $25.4 Million Employees: 92 Industry: Manufacturing Downloaded: 116gb Phone Number:(512) 345-4200
